summary: Iteration 36: Comprehensive frontend testing of bulk delete feature and related UI interactions. All 12 test scenarios passed. Tested: login, assets loading (500 items), view toggle (Cards/List), column configuration with presets, selection in list view, 'Sélectionner les 500' button, clear selection, single delete modal with warning icon, bulk delete modal with warning icon and item count, pagination navigation, selection preservation between views, row delete button, card selection checkbox, and filter chips.
passed_tests: TEST 1: View Toggle - Switch between List and Cards view works
TEST 2: Column Configuration - Panel opens with presets (complete, default, simple)
TEST 3: Selection in List View - Clicking row checkbox shows bulk action bar with correct count
TEST 4: Select All Filtered - 'Sélectionner les 500' selects all 500 items
TEST 5: Clear Selection - 'Annuler' button clears selection and hides bulk bar
TEST 6: Single Delete Modal - Trash icon on card shows modal with warning icon and asset name
TEST 6: Single Delete Modal - 'Annuler' closes modal without deleting
TEST 7: Bulk Delete Modal - 'Supprimer' button shows confirmation modal with warning icon and correct item count (3 assets)
TEST 7: Bulk Delete Modal - 'Annuler' closes modal without deleting
TEST 8: Pagination - Navigation works (1-15 sur 500 -> 16-30 sur 500 -> back to 1-15)
TEST 9: Selection Preservation - Selection preserved when switching between List and Cards view
TEST 10: Row Delete Button - Trash icon in list view row opens single delete modal
TEST 11: Card Selection Checkbox - Clicking checkbox on card selects item and shows bulk bar
TEST 12: Filter Chips - Entrée/Sortie/Tous filters work (API calls made)
critical_code_review_comments: handleBulkDelete (line 208-261): Correctly closes modal immediately, shows progress overlay, processes deletions sequentially, updates deletedIds Set, shows 600ms pause at 100%, clears states and shows result toast
handleSingleDelete (line 263-298): Implements undo pattern - hides item immediately, sets 5s timeout for API call, allows undo within window
Selection state (selectedIds Set): Properly maintained across view switches (Cards/List)
Bulk action bar (line 759-779): Shows correct count, 'Sélectionner les 500' link, 'Supprimer' and 'Annuler' buttons
Delete confirmation modals: Both single and bulk modals have warning icon (AlertTriangle), correct text, and Annuler/Supprimer buttons
Pagination (line 903-937): Proper page navigation with first/prev/next/last buttons and page numbers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested all bulk delete UI features. Key data-testids verified: bulk-action-bar, bulk-delete-btn, delete-confirm-modal, confirm-delete-btn, single-delete-modal, confirm-single-delete-btn, clear-selection-btn, select-all-filtered, row-select-{i}, card-select-{i}, row-delete-btn-{i}, asset-delete-btn-{i}, col-config-btn, col-config-panel, col-preset-{key}, assets-pagination, pg-next, pg-prev, filter-{code}. All modals show warning icon and correct item counts. Selection is preserved between view switches.
